# cirro_agent (Resource)

Manages a Cirro compute agent. The agent software must be installed separately on your compute infrastructure and will register itself once running.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cirro_agent" "example" {
  name          = "On-Prem HPC Cluster"
  agent_role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/CirroAgentRole"

  tags = {
    cluster = "hpc-01"
    site    = "us-east"
  }

  environment_configuration = {
    QUEUE          = "default"
    MAX_VCPUS      = "256"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_role_arn` (String) ARN of the AWS IAM role or user the agent will assume (format: arn:aws:iam::...).
- `name` (String) Display name for the agent.

### Optional

- `environment_configuration` (Map of String) Environment configuration key-value pairs passed to the agent.
- `tags` (Map of String) Key-value tags displayed to users when selecting this agent.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `registration_agent_version` (String) Agent software version reported after registration.
- `registration_hostname` (String) Hostname reported by the agent after registration.
- `registration_os` (String) Operating system reported by the agent after registration.
- `status` (String) Agent status: ONLINE or OFFLINE.
- `updated_at` (String)
